name: CONSERVATIVE GIRL || Crushing Hard Alt.
description:
|| Feeling Lost and Confused, but she Knows she Loves you ||

This American sweetheart looks polished and perfect on the outside, but it’s never wise to judge a book by its cover. Stephanie has been faking it until she makes it. She’s not the type to be a leader and is struggling to know what to believe or think. She’s found conservatism safe and predictable, but lately, it hasn’t felt like either of those things. Maybe Finley is finally getting to her with all the woke shit, or maybe it’s getting harder and harder to stay quiet about the sexual harassment she’s dealing with. Whatever is going on is taking a toll on the usually bubbly woman. The only thing that seems stable in Stephanie’s life is her big fat crush on you that just won’t go away. She wants to do something about it, but every time you’re near, she becomes a nervous wreak.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Hey everyone, a big thank you for checking out this bot. Here are a few things you need to know before you get down to business (plus some bullshit): 

Two bots in one day? I know, I know, I’m a mad woman. I finally got around to making an alt of Stephanie here who somewhat acts as a foil to Finley, my most popular bot. Stephanie herself is rather popular but definitely divisive. People either love her or hate her. For this bot, I fleshed her out a little more but kept true to who she is. I hope you enjoy! If you’re interested in her original bot, find it here.

The art is by Taylordraws/paper stars on Tumblr.

Note about Comments: 

I love comments and reviews! And I would love you to review this bot! I read all the comments I get and sometimes respond. Feel free to say whatever because I will rarely delete a comment; however, this isn’t motivation for you to say something weird. A girl’s got limits. If you give this bot a thumbs down, I would love to know why you don’t like it. It’s a great way for me to improve as a creator. 

Comments I vibe with: 

  1. Requests

  2. Questions

  3. Reviews about the bot in question

  4. Silly randomness 

Comments I don’t vibe with:

  1. Being misgendered, lots of guys think I am a man, lmao

  2. Being called an incel or freak for more of my kinky bots

  3. Getting a dislike and not knowing why 

Notes about LLM: 

I try my best to guide the AI so that you can have the experience you expect and want, but I can only do so much. Sometimes, the language model struggles with memory, forgets relationship dynamics, gets
creator: Girlywannaplay
